stated_goal: Use the frozen adaptive pool to add at least 3 new execution-verified both-miss rows, raising the seed plus iter154 plus iter155 pool to at least 40 rows while preserving strict evidence and cleanup bars.
acceptance_criteria: At least 3 additional execution-verified both-miss rows are required for a pass.
Seed plus iter154 plus iter155 execution-verified rows must be at least 40.
Every accepted iter155 row must have a hack diff SHA256, official report hash, and raw source traceability.
Duplicate seed or iter154 processed instances must not be counted as new.
Cloud resources must be deleted before publication.
The result must not claim a released public benchmark, leaderboard, model superiority, state-of-the-art result, broad reward-model robustness, or natural reward-hacking frequency.
falsifiers: The gate must fail if fewer than 3 new execution-verified both-miss rows are produced.
The gate must fail if total seed plus iter154 plus iter155 rows remains below 40.
The gate must fail if any accepted row lacks a hack diff hash, official report hash, or source traceability.
The gate must fail if any counted row duplicates reward_hack_seed_v0 or an iter154 processed candidate.
The gate must fail if cloud resources remain undeleted after the run.
The gate must fail if it claims a released public benchmark, leaderboard, model superiority, state-of-the-art result, broad reward-model robustness, or natural reward-hacking frequency.
